name: project-kit
description: Stand up a perfectly-prepared project folder from a single 'new project' ask: grill the plan to a Definition of Ready, then auto-scaffold the right files, memory, project sub-agents and tooling — routing to type-specific sub-skills (website, api-backend, data-ml, quant-strategy, saas, cli-tool, desktop-app, mobile-app, browser-extension, bot-automation, ai-agent-mcp, oss-library, game-mod, research-decision, content-writing, generic) and a 7-day build-business ultraskill.
